title: Publish StagedProposalProcessor v1.2
summary: Publishes build 2 of the StagedProposalProcessor (release 1) on the SPP repo.
description:
Calls `createVersion` on the SPP plugin repo to publish v1.2 (release 1, build 2).

Build 2 is recompiled against an amended `osx-commons` `RuledCondition`. The installation parameters are unchanged versus build 1.

Existing v1.1 installations can update in place via the setup's `prepareUpdate` flow, which deploys a fresh `SPPRuleCondition` seeded with the existing rules and migrates the `CREATE_PROPOSAL` and `UPDATE_RULES` permissions from the old helper to the new one.
